src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Replace a boilerplate-heavy immutable class with a Java record to leverage modern language features.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.human_impl: Changed 'public class MyConnectorEvent' with manual constructor, getter, equals, hashCode, and toString to 'public record MyConnectorEvent(MockSubscriptionEvent event) {}'.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Migrate from legacy InboundConnectorExecutable API to the new generic interface requiring explicit context type parameter.
Replace deprecated property binding and validation methods with the new bindProperties API.
Update annotation metadata to use new naming conventions for connector name and type.
Simplify event correlation by removing intermediate variable assignment.
Rename context field to shorter name for brevity.
Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace standards.
Convert the class to a Java record to leverage modern language features for immutable data carriers.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.human_impl: public record MyConnectorProperties(@NotNull String sender, @Max(10) @Min(1) int messagesPerMinute) {}

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Remove the @Secret annotation which is no longer present in the new SDK version or usage pattern.
Reorder modifiers for the static final logger field to follow standard Java conventions.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.human_impl: Changed 'private final static Logger' to 'private static final Logger'.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Reformat the constructor signature to place parameters on separate lines for better readability.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.human_impl: Moved 'String sender, int messagesPerMinute, Consumer<MockSubscriptionEvent> callback' to new lines.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Simplify the lambda expression formatting by removing unnecessary line breaks.
Move the constant MAX_CODE from a class field to a local variable within the method where it is used.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.human_impl: Removed 'private final int MAX_CODE = 10;' field and added 'int MAX_CODE = 10;' inside getRandomEvent().

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Refactor a standard POJO class into a Java record to leverage modern language features for immutable data carriers.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.human_impl: public record MockSubscriptionEvent(String sender, int code, String message) {}

src/test/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Refactor the local runtime to be a self-contained Spring Boot application instead of delegating to a shared class.
src/test/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.human_impl: Added @SpringBootApplication annotation and changed SpringApplication.run argument to LocalConnectorRuntime.class

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.
Upgrade the Camunda Connectors SDK version to 8.4.4.
Upgrade Maven Clean Plugin to version 3.3.2.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to version 3.12.1.
Upgrade Maven Dependency Plugin to version 3.6.1.
Upgrade Maven Shade Plugin to version 3.5.1.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to version 3.2.5.
Replace separate connector-core and spring-zeebe dependencies with the unified connectors version property.
Replace the spring-zeebe-connector-runtime test dependency with the new spring-boot-starter-camunda-connectors artifact.

.github/workflows/CI.yaml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 to align with the target JDK migration.
Upgrade the GitHub Actions checkout action from v3 to v4 for modernization.

.tool-versions.general_idea: Update the local development Java runtime from version 11 to version 21 to align with the target JDK.
Update the local development Python runtime from version 3.11 to 3.12.

element-templates/inbound-template-conne.general_idea: Introduce a new 'Output' group in the element template to organize output-related configuration properties.
Move the 'Sender' property from the 'endpoint' group to the 'config' group for better logical grouping.
element-templates/inbound-template-conne.human_impl: Changed "group":"endpoint" to "group":"config" for the Sender property.

element-templates/inbound-template-conne.general_idea: Add a 'Result variable' property to allow users to specify the name of the variable storing the event contents.
element-templates/inbound-template-conne.human_impl: Added property with binding name 'resultVariable' in the 'output' group.

element-templates/inbound-template-conne.general_idea: Add a 'Variable expression' property to allow mapping event elements to process variables using FEEL expressions.
element-templates/inbound-template-conne.human_impl: Added property with binding name 'resultExpression' and feel 'required' in the 'output' group.

src/test/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Rename the Zeebe client configuration property to align with the updated Connector SDK API.
